content.en:
Ultimate Realm Lord!

It was the first time that Ye Tian knew the realm above the Nine Realms.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord said again: "Don't think about the Ultimate Realm Lord for the time being, that realm is too far away from us. You can go to the Void Heaven Pavilion to have a look, where the cultivation materials about the Ninth Realm are recorded, but they are not allowed to leak out. "

Then, the Void Immortal Realm Lord left.

Ye Tian soon came to the Void Heaven Pavilion and found the cultivation materials about the Ninth Realm.

It didn't take long for him to finish reading.

At this time, he realized how far away he was from the true invincible existence of the Ninth Realm.

According to this cultivation material, the peak of the Ninth Realm and the comprehension of the Nine Realms are still nothing, far from being invincible.

If you want to become stronger, you must master the ultimate dimensional killing move, and only by mastering an ultimate dimensional killing move can you be considered a real strongman.

But how to master the ultimate dimension killing move, it was not said above, and he didn't know.

He contacted the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm and wanted to ask for advice.

20 And the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm only dropped one sentence: First comprehend the Nine Realms Supreme Strength Peerless Learning, and then come to me!

"Then you can only comprehend the Nine Realms Supreme Absolute Sect first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Joining the Void Heaven Palace, the advantage is that you can observe the other Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Inheritance, and you only need to make a little contribution.

And when he joined the Void Heaven Palace, he had some contribution points, and he directly exchanged for the six supreme supreme mastery inheritances, mainly for reference, so that he could create his own Nine Realms supreme mastery faster.

In addition, there is also a Void Heaven Monument in the Void Heaven Palace, whose value is far greater than the Pearl of the Ruins, which can help him comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension.

However, if you want to be enlightened, you have to spend contribution points.

Ye Tian spent the rest of his contribution points on this, so as to comprehend the supreme dimensional rules of the higher realm.

Time passes.

Another 100,000 domain yuan years have passed.

this day.

The drill dimension of the Void Heaven Palace is in the void.

Ye Tian is practicing the Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Sect here.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of many multi-dimensional stars condensed together, and instantly exploded into a ray of light, piercing through the void in front of them.

"It's done, this move multi-dimensional star silk has finally reached the standard of the Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Learning!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

With his current strength, he can kill the ninth realm such as the Peacock Realm Lord and the Cover Shadow Realm Lord in an instant with a single blow.

However, in the Void Heaven Palace, this strength is not enough, and those Ninth Realms who have mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move can still easily kill him in seconds.

And with the help of the Void Heaven Monument, he also raised the Supreme Dimensional Rules to the realm of sixty levels.

But his cultivation was still in the early stage of the Ninth Realm, and there were many places in the Void Heaven Palace to quickly improve his cultivation in the Ninth Realm, but he had no contribution points, so naturally he couldn't go there to practice, but he was not in a hurry.

He contacted the Void Immortal Realm Lord and informed her that he had comprehended the Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Technique.

Soon, he met the Void Immortal Realm Lord again.

When he unleashed the multi-dimensional star silk, the Void Immortal Realm Lord showed a satisfied expression.

"That's right, it's indeed the Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Learning!" the Void Immortal Realm Lord nodded, "Then next, I'll tell you some secret knowledge." "

Wow!

A dimensional map appears, showing the location of the first nine realms in the upper realm and the location of the eighteenth dimension.

"You should know that our nine ultimate forces occupy the former No. 9 multidimensional territory, and the outside world doesn't know the secrets of the former No. 9 territory at all. In fact, the first nine realms are connected to the sea of dimensions beyond the eighteenth dimension!"

"What, Dimensional Sea?"

Ye Tian heard it for the first time.

"Yes, the Sea of Dimensions!" the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm introduced, "There are countless dimensional voids in the Sea of Dimensions, all kinds of dimensional heaven and earth, full of the supreme origin of dimensional rules, and the source of all dimensions. And the way to master the ultimate dimensional killing move is in the sea of dimensions, and it is impossible to master the ultimate dimensional killing move in our side of the world. "

Then, the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said his experience, "I have mastered an ultimate dimensional killing move-Breaking Kill, in order to master this ultimate dimensional killing move, I entered a special dimensional heaven and earth-Sha Yuan, where no other power systems are allowed, only a special multi-dimensional force is allowed to exist. I went through 70,000 comings, and I almost really fell, and then I mastered the destruction!"

"The trick to mastering the ultimate dimensional killing move is that you must forget about other power systems, concentrate on a multi-dimensional force, and cultivate this multi-dimensional power to the extreme, so that you can hope to comprehend the ultimate dimensional killing move. If you enter a special dimensional world, all the clones must fall into a deep sleep, and all your minds must be concentrated in the dimensional heaven and earth, and you can only hope to master the ultimate dimensional killing moves. "

"However, if you are killed in the dimensional world, as long as your consciousness returns, you will still not die, but there is a kind of existence in some dimensional heaven and earth that can directly kill all your consciousness, and even kill all your clones in the air, so it is also dangerous to descend on the dimensional heaven and earth. "

"Our Void Heaven Palace can help you descend to one dimension after another, but we can't protect you, after all, no one knows when you are in danger, and when you encounter danger, it is too late to rescue. Of course, if it is the heir of those three Ultimate Realm Lords, then there must be special treatment, and there is no danger in 377. "

After the Void Immortal Realm Lord finished speaking, Ye Tian had some understanding of how to master the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move.

After that, the Void Immortal Realm Lord said, "If you don't master the ultimate dimension killing move, you must not go to the dimensional sea, otherwise you will definitely die." There are many strong people in the Sea of Dimensions who have mastered the ultimate dimensional killing moves, and even mastered more than two ultimate dimensional killing moves, and even I dare not enter the Dimensional Sea. "

"Thank you Void Immortal Realm Lord for reminding me. "

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"If you want to descend to the dimensional world and try to comprehend the ultimate dimensional killing move, you can apply for it. However, I still suggest that you wait for the Supreme Dimension Rule Realm to be higher and the soul will to be stronger before going, although it is not very helpful, but at least you have more insight and stronger comprehension. And when he really encounters danger, his own strength is strong, so he can block the enemy's air attack. The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said again.

"I see!"

Ye Tianying said.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian began to accumulate strength and try to obtain contribution points.

The Void Heaven Palace can only take tasks when it accumulates contribution points, such as going to the Sea of Dimensions to complete some tasks, which is more dangerous, and it is definitely not possible to do it if it is not strong.

There are also tasks such as collecting Taihao gold liquid, and the contribution value is not much.

But soon, Ye Tian found a good task, which suited him very well.
